details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

next_step.current_state: Need evidence of which invoice files are linked to Claudia before replying.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search invoice records for Claudia linkage
Read matched invoice files to confirm dates/identity
Draft outbound email and delete processed inbox item

plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read matching invoice files to verify recipient linkage and dates

next_step.current_state: Need nested outbox rules before creating outbound email file.

Delete processed inbox file and complete
next_step.observation: 60_outbox AGENTS confirms outbox is durable outbound state and recipient identity should use canonical primary_contact_email.

next_step.current_state: Prepared to create durable outbound reply email in outbox using verified sender context and confirmed invoice attachments.
next_step.observation: All required evidence gathered: sender verified as Miles and two requested Claudia-linked invoices identified.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 2 invoices linked to Claudia Reiter.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft written successfully; next required workflow step is deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox file content was already read and the outbound draft was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox message, created outbound draft reply with requested attachments, and deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md was deleted after completion.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message and prepared a reply draft to miles@novak.example with the two requested Claudia-linked invoices attached. The processed inbox item was then removed from 00_inbox.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system workflows before task work, treated inbox frontmatter as canonical email metadata, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email in cast, used canonical entity linkage to confirm invoice records, created outbox draft per sending-email schema, kept attachments newest-first, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender identity matched (10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email equals inbox from). Request target resolved via canonical entity file (10_entities/cast/claudia.md). Two oldest invoices linked to Claudia were verified directly in invoice records via related_entity and issued_on fields (INV-0006 on 2025-12-18 and INV-0007 on 2026-01-19). Outbound draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox and inbox item deleted per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
